sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁבנה שׁבנא

Transliteration: shebnâ' shebnâh

Phonetic: sheb-naw'

BDB Definition:

Shebna = "vigour"
  1. a person of high position in the court of king Hezekiah of Judah; subsequently the secretary of Hezekiah

Origin: from an unused root meaning to grow

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
